calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 501. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Phil Kilduff, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff Alliance Credit Services.
Declaration of Plaintiff's Witness Richard Segol in lieu of live testimony (CCP 98) was presented in open court.
No appearance by Defendant Vincent A. Williams.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal of $1,897.17
Prejudgment Interest $867.50
Waived Atty Fees & Costs
Total Judgment - $2,764.67
Counsel to prepare and submit the proposed judgment by tomorrow to Dept. 514 for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
